nodes.label: P5.8 — natural-data confirmation: decay real on both anchors; temp-fix holds where depth composes
nodes.rationale: Decay reproduces on digits (+0.260) and CIFAR-flat (+0.094) — not a synthetic artifact; temp0.2 fix reproduces on digits (+0.152, halves the decay) but is null-but-safe on the no-headroom CIFAR-flat wall (needs convolution, out of scope) — commit the fix, scoped honestly.

nodes.label: P5.8 verdict: the decay is real on natural data; the temp-fix holds where depth composes, null-but-safe elsewhere
nodes.rationale: The decay reproduces on digits (+0.260) and CIFAR-flat (+0.094), ruling out a synthetic-only artifact; the temp0.2 fix reproduces on digits (+0.152, halving the decay) but is null on CIFAR-flat (+0.006, within noise) because that anchor is the established no-headroom wall needing convolution — the fix is committed as scoped, not universal.
